reasoning: Ethylene glycol monomethyl ether (2-methoxyethanol, CH3-O-CH2-CH2-OH) contains both an ether linkage (methoxy group) and a hydroxyl group. As a dialkyl ether (the oxygen is flanked by two aliphatic carbon chains), the direct parent is best classified as 'Dialkyl ethers', and it falls under organooxygen compounds / ethers.
